results.reason: Visible transcript shows MCP calls and server restarts occurred, but not the action/result hashes or exact runtime outputs needed to verify the gate-pass action chain.
Visible corrections identify caller error and later safe-claim fix, but visible text alone cannot verify which runtime responses resolved each contradiction.
Visible replay sees references to Proof 010 and Proof 011 but cannot reconstruct the authority chain from user instructions, proof policies, memory refs, and runtime audit refs.
Visible replay knows earlier failures were summarized, but cannot recover the omitted fail-closed ranges, raw command outputs, or advisory response hash refs.
Visible transcript mentions a required checkout and server, but not the verified commit refs, endpoint, or workspace dependency evidence.
Visible replay can infer retries occurred, but cannot reconstruct the full sequence of failure trigger, recovery action, and evidence refs.
Visible-only replay cannot separate user authority, proof-boundary authority, and pond-backed runtime authority without authority_refs and tool result refs.
Visible transcript contains relative ordering, but not the temporal validity refs tying 22b5839 to the earlier failed rerun and 1c89d45 to the passing candidate-risk gate.
